privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the public Natural Earth countries dataset (ne_110m_admin_0_countries), which is downloaded during environment installation. The dataset is confirmed to contain the field 'POP_EST'. The task requires applying a 5-class Equal Intervals symbology to this field. The verifier checks the gvSIG project file (.gvsproj) for presence of interval symbology on 'POP_EST' with exactly 5 classes and at least 4 distinct colors.
